'''Nensil''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Rhinnal system/Legends|Rhinnal system]]. It was a barren rock.<ref name="Core Worlds" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
